introduced_concepts.name: Standard Deviation
introduced_concepts.definition: A square-root scale measure of spread around the mean.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 方差的平方根，用来表示分散程度的尺度。

introduced_concepts.name: Trait Variance
introduced_concepts.definition: Trait Variance is a background quantity used in the local formula context.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: Trait Variance 是当前公式中使用的背景量，用来帮助理解公式中的符号关系。

introduced_concepts.definition: The trait value at which the fitness function reaches its optimum.
